JUNGLE ROUTINE:

1- go to red buff
2-head towards the blue buff after the red buff is killed
3-kill the small dinosaur that have a purple head and a blue body near the blue buff, the one in near the big rock
4- continue killing the lord and turtle when it spawns

He is good with crowded places when with his ultimate ready.

data.title: BEST HERO FOR COUNTERING META EXP LANER

dominants.dominant_desc: Before your team commits to a teamfight, use your Skill 1 to poke. When the fight starts, use your Ultimate to quickly reach the enemy backline and coordinate with your team's crowd control to secure kills. Even without getting kills, you can disrupt the enemy's damage output. After your armor explodes, use the dash to either chase or retreat based on the situation. With Immortality's resurrect effect, don't worry about survival and focus on drawing enemy fire as much as possible.

In the mid-game, after obtaining War Axe and Immortality, stay in the side lanes to split-push and draw the enemy's attention to create opportunities for your team. If the enemy has wasted a lot of cooldowns trying to kill you, you can choose to counterattack with the support of your teammates.

emblems.emblem_desc: The Tank Emblem and HP Talent ensure X.Borg has more armor during the laning phase. As long as burst Fighters can't break your armor in one combo, you can wear them down and have a better chance of survival when being ganked. The dual Lifesteal Talents provide good sustainability, allowing you to hold your lane even if you can't pick up Firaga supplies.

equips.equip_desc: This build ensures sustainability thanks to War Axe. After obtaining Immortality as the second item, even 2 opponents will have a hard time trying to kill you. In teamfights, you can initiate or charge into the enemy backline more safely. Pick up Ice Queen Wand third for stronger crowd control ability. Finally, add two defensive equipment to improve your late-game survivability. Since X.Borg has True Damage, he does not need a lot of offensive equipment.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker works very well with X.Borg's kit. Use it during his Ultimate to guarantee that it connects.
